title: Elio and the Lost Baby Bird
synopsis: When Elio finds a scared baby bird that has fallen from its nest, he feels worried but becomes brave to help his new feathered friend find its way back home to its mama.

pages.text: Elio was playing in his backyard when he heard a tiny sound. "Peep! Peep!" He looked around and saw a small yellow baby bird on the ground. The bird looked scared and sad. "Oh no," said Elio. "Where is your mama?"

illustration.description: A young Latino boy with dark curly hair and warm brown skin kneels in a sunny backyard with green grass and colorful flowers. He wears a bright red t-shirt and blue shorts. Next to him is a tiny yellow chick with big worried eyes sitting on the ground. The scene has a cheerful cartoon style with rounded shapes and soft textures.
illustration.alt: Elio kneeling next to a small yellow baby bird in a colorful backyard

pages.text: Elio felt worried about the little bird. He wanted to help but didn't know how. The baby bird kept saying "Peep! Peep!" and looking up at the tall oak tree. "Are you trying to tell me something?" Elio asked. He looked up and saw a nest high in the branches.

illustration.description: Elio stands looking up at a tall green oak tree with his hand shading his eyes. His expression shows concern and concentration. The baby bird sits at his feet, also looking up at the tree. High in the branches, a brown nest is visible among the leaves. The background has a paper-like texture with bright blue sky and puffy white clouds.
illustration.alt: Elio and the baby bird looking up at a nest in a tall tree

pages.text: Elio felt brave now. He knew what to do! He gently picked up the baby bird and held it close to keep it safe. "Don't be scared, little friend," he whispered. Then he called for his mama. "Mama! Can you help me put this baby bird back in its nest?" His mama came outside with a big smile.

illustration.description: Elio carefully holds the yellow baby bird in his cupped hands close to his chest. His face shows a gentle, protective expression. Behind him, a kind-looking Latina woman with long dark hair in a yellow dress approaches with outstretched arms and a warm smile. The scene uses warm colors and soft lighting to show care and safety.
illustration.alt: Elio holding the baby bird while his mama approaches to help

pages.text: Elio's mama carefully climbed the ladder and placed the baby bird back in its nest. Soon, mama bird came flying back and chirped happily to see her baby safe. The baby bird peeped with joy! Elio felt so happy and proud. He had been brave and helped his new friend. "Good job, Elio," said his mama, giving him a big hug.

illustration.description: A heartwarming scene showing Elio's mama on a ladder placing the baby bird in a cozy brown nest. A beautiful red and brown mama bird flies nearby with wings spread wide and a joyful expression. Below, Elio watches with his arms raised in celebration, his face beaming with happiness and pride. The scene is filled with warm golden light and has a triumphant, joyful mood.
illustration.alt: The baby bird being returned to its nest while mama bird flies nearby and Elio celebrates below

metadata.illustrationStyle: Bright, cheerful cartoon style with expressive faces. Bold primary colors. Rounded, friendly shapes. Slightly textured backgrounds like construction paper.

questions.question: How did Elio feel when he first saw the baby bird?
questions.explanation: Elio felt worried when he saw the scared baby bird on the ground.

questions.question: Where was the baby bird's nest?
questions.explanation: The baby bird's nest was high up in the tall oak tree.

questions.question: How did Elio feel when he decided to help?
questions.explanation: Elio felt brave when he decided to help the baby bird.

questions.question: How did everyone feel at the end?
questions.explanation: Everyone felt happy when the baby bird was safely back with its mama.

pages.text: Elio found a ___ baby bird that was scared and ___.
Elio felt ___ and helped put the baby bird back in its ___.
